channel.title: Topological Defect on OkongOyangO's Notes
channel.description: Recent content in Topological Defect on OkongOyangO's Notes

item.title: 😬KT Transition: 2D XY Model, Topological Vortices, and Quasi-Long-Range Order
item.author: yzj5306@psu.edu (OkongOyangO)
item.description: The KT transition (Kosterlitz-Thouless Transition) is a unique topological phase transition in two-dimensional systems. Unlike conventional phase transitions, it is not driven by spontaneous symmetry breaking, but by the binding-unbinding of topological defects—vortices. Starting from the 2D XY model, this article explains the basic principles of the KT transition.
